justification: All 7 ACs covered with correct test logic. AC6 boundary correctly tested as valid (amount=10000, status approved). AC7 whitespace tested with '   '. AC2 fee arithmetic verified numerically (refundAmount === 98.5 === 100 - 1.50). Boundary values exact (0, 10001, 10000). No implementation changes. acceptance_criteria_coverage complete with all 7 ACs mapped to test names. deviations array is empty.

observations.text: All 7 ACs have 1:1 test coverage with explicit AC labels in test names
AC6 correctly tests 10000 as valid (approved), not as an error
AC7 uses whitespace-only string '   ' as required
AC2 verifies exact fee arithmetic: refundAmount === 98.5 (100 - 1.50)
Boundary values are exact: 0 for AC4, 10001 for AC5, 10000 for AC6
Smart isolation choice: AC6 uses credit_card to avoid fee noise on boundary test
Uses exact error message matching in toThrow() for precise validation
No implementation files modified — tests only
